sections.title: A: Word formation
sections.instructions: Use the word given in capitals at the end of each line to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

items.sentence: People don't always show their true ...... . (FEEL)
Somebody with a big smile on their face might actually be ...... . (HAPPY)
One of the reasons for this is that our ...... life is very personal. (EMOTION)
Not everyone is ...... to our problems, so we have to protect ourselves. (SYMPATHY)
Some people, particularly teenagers, appear ...... by everything. (BORE)
Even things that they actually find ...... . (EXCITE)
This may be because they think it's not very cool to be ...... about things. (EXCITE)
Or to be too ...... and enthusiastic. (ENERGY)

sections.title: B: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: Come ...... , or we're going to be late!
Just hang ...... one second while I find my mobile phone.
Peter is so noisy! I wish he would just shut ...... !
It annoyed me that Jason just went ...... talking when he could see I was crying.
Try to calm ...... and tell us exactly what has happened.
You'll have to speak ...... because I can't hear what you're saying.
Did you know that Sarah ran ...... from home when she was fourteen?
I was feeling sad, but seeing my cousins really cheered me ...... .

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
I'm depressed because I don't have enough money to buy a new pair of jeans. **afford**
I'm depressed because I ...... a new pair of jeans.

Pam looked like she was happy, but I knew she was sad. **pretended**
Pam ...... happy, but I knew she was sad.

Toby made me feel bad about what I'd done. **made**
I ...... bad by Toby about what I'd done.

I made up my mind to apologise to Mary. **decided**
I ...... to Mary.

We finally succeeded in cheering Michael up. **managed**
We finally ...... Michael up.

I don't argue with friends if I can avoid it. **avoid**
I ...... with friends if I can.
